description: Event-driven daily trading brief system with 4D scoring, evidence timelines, and actionable trade suggestions

userStories.title: Extend DuckDB schema for events system
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the database schema extended to support events, observations with richer metadata, and daily briefs.
acceptanceCriteria: Add columns to events table: event_type, parent_event_id, last_update_at, start_at, resolved_at, pinned, snoozed_until, dismissed_reason, title_template, title_source
Add event_id column to signals table
Add columns to observations table: source_url, title, summary, raw_payload, fact_entries, entity_mapping_confidence, payload_truncated
Create daily_briefs table with id, date, summary_json, report_path_md, report_path_json, generation_method, created_at, run_id
Create event_type_history table with id, event_id, old_type, new_type, changed_at, trigger_observation_id
Migration runs successfully without data loss
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Implemented in commit d6dd8c7. Added 4D scores to events, extended EventType/EventStatus enums, created DailyBrief and EventTypeHistory models.

userStories.title: Implement EventBuilder core aggregation logic
userStories.description: As a developer, I need an EventBuilder class that aggregates observations into events by entity_id within a configurable time window.
acceptanceCriteria: Create EventBuilder class in src/tradz/events/builder.py
Implement build_events() that groups observations by entity_id within 72h window (configurable)
Implement event_type classification: market_anomaly, catalyst_news, catalyst_filing, flow_congress, flow_13f, prediction_shift, mixed, uncertain
Calculate attention_score from 4D scores: 0.3*anomaly + 0.3*catalyst + 0.25*flow + 0.15*confidence + coverage_bonus
Coverage bonus: +5 per independent source, max +20
Support Primary/Secondary event hierarchy via parent_event_id
Unit tests cover all event_type classification rules
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Implemented in commit c592291. Created EventBuilder class with 72h window grouping, event_type classification, 4D scoring with coverage bonus, and Primary/Secondary hierarchy. 34 unit tests pass.

userStories.title: Implement LLM title generation with fallback
userStories.description: As a developer, I need event titles generated via LLM with template fallback when LLM fails.
acceptanceCriteria: Create LLMProvider abstraction supporting ClaudeCLIProvider, OpenRouterProvider, MockProvider
Implement generate_title() that calls LLM with event context
Title format: '[Entity] [Action Verb] [Key Detail]' e.g. 'AAPL Surges 8% on Strong Earnings Beat'
Implement template fallback: '{symbol}: {event_type} ({attention_score})' when LLM fails
Store title_source as 'llm' or 'template' in events table
LLM timeout configurable (default 10s), max 2 retries
Unit tests cover LLM success, failure, and fallback scenarios
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Implemented in commit 3a7aa7f. Created LLMProvider abstraction with ClaudeCLIProvider, OpenRouterProvider, and MockProvider. TitleGenerator generates LLM titles with template fallback. 63 unit tests pass.

userStories.title: Implement FactTableEntry extraction
userStories.description: As a developer, I need observations to extract structured FactTableEntry data to prevent LLM fabrication.
acceptanceCriteria: Define FactTableEntry dataclass with fact_id, fact_type, label, value, unit, source, timestamp, observation_id
Implement extract_facts() for each observation source type
Congress source extracts: politician, party, trade_type, amount_range, ticker, trade_date
SEC source extracts: filing_type, filed_date, form_url, key_items
News source extracts: headline, publisher, published_at, sentiment_score
Market source extracts: price, change_pct, volume, volume_vs_avg
Store fact_entries JSON in observations table
Unit tests verify fact extraction for each source type
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Implemented in commit df7e675. Created FactType enum (23 types), updated FactTableEntry dataclass with new fields and backward compatibility, created fact_extractor.py with extractors for all source types. 40 unit tests pass.

userStories.title: Implement Events API endpoints
userStories.description: As a developer, I need REST API endpoints to retrieve events with filtering and pagination.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /api/events returns event list with status, sort, limit, offset params
GET /api/events/{event_id} returns event detail with timeline and facts
Response includes: event_id, entity_id, title, event_type, status, attention_score, 4D scores, observation_count, last_update_at
Support status filter: active (new+ongoing), resolved, dismissed, all
Support sort: attention_score desc (default), last_update_at desc, created_at desc
Pagination with limit (default 20, max 100) and offset
API tests cover all filter/sort combinations
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Implemented in commit. Created EventService for database queries with filtering/sorting/pagination, Pydantic schemas for request/response validation, and events router with two endpoints. 24 API tests pass.

userStories.title: Implement System Status API
userStories.description: As a developer, I need an API endpoint that returns data source health status.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /api/system/status returns health status for all data sources
Response includes per-source: name, status (ok/degraded/error), last_success_at, last_error, record_count_24h
Response includes overall: total_sources, healthy_count, degraded_count, error_count
Status determined by: ok if success in last hour, degraded if success in last 24h, error otherwise
Include data freshness indicator per source
API tests verify status calculation logic
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Implemented in commit. Created SystemService with health check logic (ok/degraded/error status based on last success timestamp), SourceHealth and OverallHealth Pydantic schemas, and system router with GET /api/system/status endpoint. 16 API tests pass.

userStories.title: Implement Signal Inbox UI component
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see a list of active events in the Signal Inbox on the Today page.
acceptanceCriteria: SignalInbox component displays events from GET /api/events
Tab switcher for Active/Resolved/All views
Empty state shows helpful message when no events
Loading state with skeleton placeholders
Error state with retry button
Auto-refresh every 5 minutes via TanStack Query
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser
userStories.notes: Implemented in commit 19299c5. Updated api/types.ts and api/client.ts to call backend GET /api/events. Added EventCardSkeleton for loading state, error state with retry button. Dashboard passes loading/error states to SignalInbox. Auto-refresh every 5 minutes via TanStack Query. Build passes.

userStories.title: Implement EventCard UI component
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see event details in a card format with scores and evidence count.
acceptanceCriteria: EventCard displays: title, entity chips, 4D score bars, evidence count badge, last_update_at, action_label
Score bars show anomaly (red), catalyst (blue), flow (green), confidence (gray)
Action label shows Act (green), Investigate (yellow), or Monitor (gray) based on confidence
Entity chips are clickable and show symbol + exchange/rank
Card is clickable to navigate to /events/{event_id}
Hover state shows subtle elevation
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser
userStories.notes: Implemented in commit. Updated EventCard with 4D score bars (red/blue/green/gray colors), action labels (Act/Investigate/Monitor based on confidence thresholds 70/40), clickable entity chips with exchange info, hover elevation effect, and card-level click handler. Build passes.

userStories.title: Implement System Status UI component
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see data source health status on the Today page.
acceptanceCriteria: SystemStatus component displays health grid from GET /api/system/status
Each source shows: icon, name, status indicator (green/yellow/red dot), last update time
Overall summary shows X/Y sources healthy
Clicking a degraded/error source shows error details in tooltip
Collapsible to save space, default expanded
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser
userStories.notes: Implemented in commit 3a654d2. Updated api/types.ts with SystemStatusResponse types, added getSystemStatus() API function, useSystemStatus hook with TanStack Query (5-min refresh), refactored SystemStatus component with health grid showing all 7 sources with icons/status dots/last update/record counts, collapsible header, hover tooltips for errors. Build passes.

userStories.title: Implement Event Card user actions
userStories.description: As a user, I want to pin, snooze, dismiss, or resolve events from the card.
acceptanceCriteria: POST /api/events/{event_id}/actions accepts action: pin, unpin, snooze, dismiss, resolve
Snooze accepts duration_hours parameter (default 24)
Dismiss accepts optional reason parameter
Actions persist to DuckDB events table
EventCard shows action menu on hover/click with Pin, Snooze 24h, Dismiss, Resolve options
Pinned events show pin icon and sort to top
Snoozed events hidden until snooze expires
Optimistic UI updates with rollback on error
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser
userStories.notes: Implemented in commit fd504d2. Added POST /api/events/{event_id}/actions endpoint with pin/unpin/snooze/dismiss/resolve actions, EventActionRequest/EventActionResponse schemas, perform_action() in EventService, and frontend optimistic updates with rollback. EventCard already had action buttons from US-005. 39 API tests pass.

userStories.title: Implement Event Detail page route and layout
userStories.description: As a user, I want to view detailed information about an event on a dedicated page.
acceptanceCriteria: Create /events/{event_id} route in frontend
Page layout: Header with title and back button, main content area, right sidebar for actions
Header shows event title, entity badges, status badge, last updated time
Loading state with skeleton
404 state when event not found
Responsive layout: sidebar below main on mobile
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser
userStories.notes: Implemented in commit f1ad55b. Created EventDetail.tsx with react-router-dom routing, responsive 3-column layout (sidebar below on mobile), loading skeleton, 404 state, header with back button/entity badges/status badge, action sidebar with pin/snooze/dismiss/resolve buttons, 4D score breakdown, and observations timeline. Added useEventDetail hook, getEventById API function, and EventDetailResponse types. Build passes.

userStories.title: Implement 4D Score Breakdown component
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see detailed breakdown of the 4D scores on the event detail page.
acceptanceCriteria: ScoreBreakdown component shows all 4 dimensions with progress bars
Each dimension shows: label, score value, contributing factors
Anomaly shows: price change %, volume vs avg, volatility
Catalyst shows: news count, filing count, polymarket shift
Flow shows: congress trade count, 13F position changes
Confidence shows: data quality, source count, freshness
Attention score shown prominently at top with formula tooltip
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser
userStories.notes: Implemented in commit e6d97f5. Created ScoreBreakdown component with prominent attention score display (formula tooltip, coverage bonus indicator), 4 expandable dimension rows with color-coded progress bars (red/blue/green/gray), and contributing factors extracted from observations. Integrated into EventDetail page replacing the simple score grid. Build passes.

userStories.title: Implement Evidence Timeline API
userStories.description: As a developer, I need an API to return chronological observations for an event.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /api/events/{event_id}/timeline returns observations sorted by timestamp desc
Each observation includes: id, source, observation_type, timestamp, title, summary, fact_entries, source_url
Support source filter param: all, market, news, sec, congress, 13f, polymarket
Support pagination with limit and offset
Include total_count in response
API tests cover filtering and pagination
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Implemented in commit 6f78e05. Added TimelineSourceFilter enum, TimelineObservation/TimelineResponse schemas, get_event_timeline() service method, and GET /api/events/{event_id}/timeline endpoint. 21 new API tests pass (60 total).

userStories.title: Implement Evidence Timeline UI component
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see a chronological timeline of evidence supporting an event.
acceptanceCriteria: EvidenceTimeline component displays observations in reverse chronological order
Each entry shows: source icon, timestamp, title, summary preview
Source filter chips: All, Market, News, SEC, Congress, 13F, Polymarket
Expandable entries show full details and fact_entries
Source URL links open in new tab
Load more button for pagination
Empty state when no observations match filter
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser
userStories.notes: Implemented in commit 43d81c7. Created EvidenceTimeline component with source filter chips, expandable entries with fact display, source URL links, load more pagination (using useInfiniteQuery), empty/loading/error states. Integrated into EventDetail page replacing the simple observation list. Build passes.

userStories.title: Implement FactTable Spotlight component
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see key facts extracted from evidence without LLM fabrication.
acceptanceCriteria: FactSpotlight component displays FactTableEntry data grouped by fact_type
Groups: Price & Volume, Filings, News, Insider Activity, Predictions
Each fact shows: label, value with unit, source attribution, timestamp
Facts are clickable to highlight related observation in timeline
No LLM-generated content in this component - only extracted facts
Citation format: [source_name, timestamp]
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser
userStories.notes: Implemented in commit c31119b. Created FactSpotlight component with 5 fact groups (Price & Volume, Filings, News, Insider Activity, Predictions), value formatting, citation display [source, time], clickable facts for observation highlighting, and No LLM indicator. Integrated into EventDetail page. Build passes.

userStories.title: Implement Trade Idea generation with quality gates
userStories.description: As a user, I want actionable trade ideas that pass quality gates, or research plans when gates fail.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement QualityGate evaluation with configurable thresholds
Gates: min_confidence (70), min_sources (2), min_anomaly (50), min_catalyst (40), has_invalidation (true)
Trade Idea includes: direction, entry_zone, target, stop_loss, invalidation condition, time_horizon
Research Plan includes: questions_to_verify, evidence_to_watch, next_check_date
Gate evaluation returns: passed (bool), gate_score (0-100), failed_gates list, improvement_suggestions
Output type determined by gate results: trade_idea if all pass, research_plan otherwise
Store recommendation in events table
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Implemented in commit 52be3c4. Created QualityGate class with 5 configurable thresholds, QualityGateEvaluation with gate_score/failed_gates/suggestions, TradeIdea and ResearchPlan dataclasses, TradeIdeaGenerator that outputs TradeIdea or ResearchPlan based on gates. 34 unit tests pass.

userStories.title: Implement Action Panel UI component
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see trade ideas or research plans in the event detail page.
acceptanceCriteria: ActionPanel component displays Trade Idea or Research Plan based on gate results
Trade Idea view shows: direction badge, entry/target/stop levels, invalidation condition, confidence meter
Research Plan view shows: questions checklist, evidence to watch, next review date
Gate evaluation summary shows which gates passed/failed with progress bars
Improvement suggestions shown for failed gates
Copy to clipboard button for sharing
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser
userStories.notes: Implemented in commit 4c6a886. Created ActionPanel component with TradeIdea and ResearchPlan views, GateEvaluationSummary showing pass/fail indicators and progress bars, copy to clipboard functionality. Added /api/events/{id}/recommendation endpoint, useEventRecommendation hook. Fixed UUID parsing for non-UUID entity_ids. Build passes.

userStories.title: Implement Daily Brief data model and generation
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a structured Daily Brief generation pipeline.
acceptanceCriteria: Define DailyBrief dataclass with: date, executive_summary, top_events, trade_ideas, research_ideas, open_loops, data_quality
Implement DailyBriefGenerator class with generate() method
Executive summary limited to 3 sentences, mentions top 3 events
Top events section includes top 5 by attention_score
Trade ideas from events with passed quality gates
Research ideas from events with failed gates but high potential
Data quality section summarizes source health
Generation method stored: 'claude' or 'template'
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Implemented in commit 72f4198. Created DailyBriefContent dataclass with structured content (executive_summary, top_events, trade_ideas, research_ideas, open_loops, data_quality). DailyBriefGenerator evaluates quality gates to separate trade ideas from research ideas, generates template-based executive summary from top 3 events, and processes system status into data quality summary. 23 unit tests pass.

userStories.title: Implement Daily Brief LLM narrative with fallback
userStories.description: As a developer, I need LLM-generated narratives for daily briefs with template fallback.
acceptanceCriteria: LLM generates executive_summary from FactTable data (no fabrication)
LLM generates natural language descriptions for each section
Template fallback generates bullet-point format when LLM fails
Template uses only FactTableEntry data for content
Fallback triggered on: LLM timeout, API error, empty response
Generation time logged for monitoring
Unit tests cover LLM and template paths
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Implemented in commit b8f4b05. Created NarrativeGenerator class with LLM-based executive summary generation using FactTableEntry data. Template fallback generates bullet-point format on LLM failure. NarrativeMetrics tracks success rate and errors. Integrated into DailyBriefGenerator with lazy initialization. 35 unit tests pass.

userStories.title: Implement Daily Brief persistence
userStories.description: As a developer, I need daily briefs saved to files and database.
acceptanceCriteria: Save markdown report to reports/{date}.md
Save JSON data to reports/{date}.json
Insert record into daily_briefs table with paths and metadata
run_id links to run_history table
Idempotent: regenerating same date overwrites files and updates DB record
File paths use ISO date format: YYYY-MM-DD
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Implemented DailyBriefPersister class with persist() method that saves to both files and database. Uses UPSERT for idempotent regeneration. 41 tests pass.

userStories.title: Implement Daily Brief API endpoint
userStories.description: As a developer, I need an API to retrieve daily briefs by date.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /api/briefs/{date} returns structured brief for given date
GET /api/briefs/latest returns most recent brief
GET /api/briefs returns list of available briefs with dates
Response includes all DailyBrief fields plus generation metadata
404 when brief not found for date
Date format: YYYY-MM-DD
API tests cover all endpoints
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Implemented all three Daily Brief API endpoints. Created BriefService for database operations, Pydantic schemas for request/response validation, and comprehensive API tests. All endpoints return proper structured responses with generation metadata.

userStories.title: Implement Daily Brief UI component
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see the daily brief on the Today page.
acceptanceCriteria: DailyBrief component fetches from GET /api/briefs/latest
Shows executive summary prominently at top
Collapsible sections: Top Events, Trade Ideas, Research Ideas, Open Loops, Data Quality
Trade Ideas show entry/target/stop with copy button
Link to full report in Reports page
SEND EMAIL button triggers email (existing emailer)
Loading and error states
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser
userStories.notes: Implemented DailyBrief component with BriefDetail types, useLatestBrief hook, and updated Dashboard.tsx. Typecheck passes. Build successful.

userStories.title: Implement Reports archive page
userStories.description: As a user, I want to browse historical daily briefs in the Reports page.
acceptanceCriteria: Reports page shows list of available briefs from GET /api/briefs
List shows: date, generation method, event count, top entity
Clicking a report shows full brief in Markdown viewer
Markdown viewer renders tables, code blocks, links properly
Date range filter for browsing history
Empty state when no reports available
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser
userStories.notes:
Implemented full Reports archive page. Key features:

1. BriefList component shows all reports from GET /api/briefs with pagination
2. Each brief displays: date, generation method (LLM/TEMPLATE badge), event count, top entity, trade idea count
3. Download buttons for Markdown and JSON formats
4. Click-to-open functionality with Markdown viewer overlay
5. Markdown viewer supports: headers, code blocks, lists, and basic formatting
6. Layout matches brutalist design aesthetic with hard borders
7. Loading state with skeleton placeholders
8. Error state with retry button
9. Empty state with helpful message
10. Pagination controls with page navigation
11. Date filter input for quick date lookup

The page auto-refreshes every 5 minutes via TanStack Query to show newly generated reports. All API integrations use existing endpoints from US-014.

userStories.title: Ensure email content matches UI brief
userStories.description: As a user, I want the emailed brief to match what I see in the UI.
acceptanceCriteria: Email uses same DailyBrief data as UI
Email template renders all sections: summary, events, ideas, loops, quality
HTML email with proper styling for tables and lists
Plain text fallback included
Subject line: 'Tradz Daily Brief - {date}'
Test by comparing email output to API response
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Implemented in commit bad0d07. Created DailyBriefEmailGenerator with HTML template matching UI format and plain text fallback. Integrated into run_nightly.py to use Daily Brief format when available. All tests pass.

userStories.title: Implement Event state machine
userStories.description: As a developer, I need automatic event state transitions based on activity.
acceptanceCriteria: Events start in 'new' state on creation
Transition to 'ongoing' when new observations added after 1h
Transition to 'stale' when no observations for 72h
User actions set: 'resolved' or 'dismissed'
Resolved/dismissed events not auto-reactivated (configurable exception for major new evidence)
State history tracked in event_type_history table
Scheduled job runs state transitions hourly
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Implemented in commit. Created EventStateManager with transition methods (new→ongoing after 1h, ongoing/new→stale after 72h), configurable reactivation (default disabled), state history tracking via record_state_transition_history(). Added scheduled runner scripts for hourly cron. 22 tests pass, typecheck clean.

userStories.title: Persist user actions to database
userStories.description: As a developer, I need all user actions (pin/snooze/dismiss/resolve) persisted.
acceptanceCriteria: Pin action sets pinned=true in events table
Unpin action sets pinned=false
Snooze action sets snoozed_until timestamp
Dismiss action sets status='dismissed' and dismissed_reason
Resolve action sets status='resolved' and resolved_at
All actions logged with timestamp and user context
Queries filter out snoozed events (snoozed_until > now)
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Implemented in commit 8036714. Added EventActionType enum and EventAction dataclass. Created event_actions table with indexes. Added insert_event_action, get_event_action_history, get_recent_event_actions methods. EventService.perform_action now logs all actions with user context. 20 unit tests pass.

userStories.title: Implement Compare Yesterday API
userStories.description: As a developer, I need an API to compare today's brief with yesterday's.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /api/reports/diff returns comparison between two briefs
Query params: date (default today), baseline (default yesterday)
Response includes: new_events, resolved_events, score_changes, new_trade_ideas, closed_loops
Score changes show delta and direction for each event
Handle missing baseline gracefully (return today only)
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Implemented in commit 8e5239c. Added GET /api/reports/diff endpoint with date/baseline params, BriefDiffResponse schema, compare_briefs service method. 19 tests pass.

userStories.title: Implement Compare Yesterday UI
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see what changed since yesterday at a glance.
acceptanceCriteria: CompareYesterday component on Today page (collapsible)
Shows: X new events, Y resolved, Z score changes
New events highlighted with 'NEW' badge
Score changes show up/down arrows with delta
Resolved events shown with strikethrough
Toggle to show full diff details
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser
userStories.notes: Implemented CompareYesterday component with collapsible UI, stat cards showing counts, NEW badge for new events, up/down arrows for score changes with delta, strikethrough for resolved events, and toggle for full details. Added BriefDiffResponse types, getBriefDiff API function, and useBriefDiff hook. Build passes.

userStories.title: Implement Open Loops data model
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to track open loops (unresolved questions) across days.
acceptanceCriteria: Define OpenLoop dataclass: loop_id, event_id, question, created_at, status, progress_notes, resolved_at
Status enum: open, in_progress, resolved, stale
Create open_loops table in DuckDB
Link loops to events via event_id
Auto-create loops from Research Plan questions
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement Open Loops API
userStories.description: As a developer, I need API endpoints for managing open loops.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /api/loops returns all open loops with status filter
GET /api/loops/{loop_id} returns loop details with progress history
POST /api/loops creates new loop manually
PATCH /api/loops/{loop_id} updates status or adds progress note
DELETE /api/loops/{loop_id} removes loop
Include related event summary in response
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement Open Loops UI
userStories.description: As a user, I want to track and update open loops from the UI.
acceptanceCriteria: OpenLoops component in Daily Brief section
Shows checklist of open questions with status indicators
Checkbox to mark loop as resolved
Text input to add progress notes
Link to related event detail page
Count badge shows N open loops
Stale loops (>7 days) highlighted in yellow
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser

userStories.title: Implement configurable Quality Gate thresholds
userStories.description: As a user, I want to configure quality gate thresholds via settings.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /api/settings/gates returns current gate thresholds
PUT /api/settings/gates updates thresholds
Thresholds: min_confidence, min_sources, min_anomaly, min_catalyst, require_invalidation
Validate thresholds are in valid ranges (0-100 for scores)
Store in config.yaml or database
Changes take effect immediately for new evaluations
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement Quality Gate settings UI
userStories.description: As a user, I want a Settings page to configure quality gate thresholds.
acceptanceCriteria: Add Settings page accessible from navigation
Quality Gates section with slider inputs for each threshold
Sliders show current value and range
Reset to Defaults button restores original values
Save button persists changes via API
Preview panel shows how changes affect sample event
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser

userStories.title: Extend Entity model for multi-asset support
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the Entity model to support Equity, Crypto, and Polymarket asset types.
acceptanceCriteria: Add entity_type field: equity, crypto, polymarket, index, commodity
Add identifiers dict for asset-specific IDs (ticker/cik for equity, coingecko_id for crypto, market_id for polymarket)
Add metadata dict for asset-specific data (sector for equity, category for crypto, end_date for polymarket)
Add related_entities list for cross-asset relationships
Implement asset type detection in EntityResolver (_looks_like_crypto, _looks_like_polymarket)
Handle identifier conflicts (e.g., LINK could be equity or crypto)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement multi-asset scoring
userStories.description: As a developer, I need unified scoring logic for different asset types.
acceptanceCriteria: Create UnifiedScorer with type-specific scorers: EquityScorer, CryptoScorer, PolymarketScorer
CryptoScorer anomaly: price (35%) + volume (25%) + onchain activity (25%) + funding rate (15%)
CryptoScorer flow: exchange flow (40%) + whale activity (35%) + institutional (25%)
PolymarketScorer anomaly: price move (50%) + volume spike (30%) + poll divergence (20%)
PolymarketScorer flow: large trades (50%) + liquidity change (30%) + smart money (20%)
Normalize scores to 0-100 using percentile ranking for cross-asset comparability
Asset-specific attention_score weights (crypto heavier on anomaly, polymarket heavier on catalyst)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement multi-asset UI components
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see Equity, Crypto, and Polymarket events in the unified Signal Inbox.
acceptanceCriteria: AssetTypeFilter component with multi-select: All, Equity, Crypto, Polymarket
Filter shows count per asset type
EntityBadge shows asset-specific icon and metadata (exchange for equity, rank for crypto, category for polymarket)
EventCard shows asset-specific metrics (EquityMetrics, CryptoMetrics, PolymarketMetrics)
MarketSnapshot shows collapsible sections per asset type with top 5 each
Related Assets section in Event Detail for cross-asset relationships
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser
